step_rationale: IL-6R trans-signaling cofactor mediating plaque inflammation and atherosclerosis progression.
mechanism: OSMR mediates IL-6 receptor trans-signaling that promotes vascular inflammation and atherosclerotic plaque destabilization.

references.title: A multi-omics approach uncovers causality of IL6R on endotypes of subclinical carotid atherosclerosis and the possible role of the IL6R/OSMR pathway.
